name: Expeditionary Forces of Abyssinia
description: Ethiopian warriors. Chewa elite, flanking specialists, short-range marksmen. No MHI.
add_rules: Abyssinian Healers: 0-2 Combat Medics. Misericordia has Limit: 2 instead of Limit: 1.
Chieftain Panoply: Mechanized Heavy Infantry cannot have Machine Armour.
Faith of Ethiopia: Cannot include Sniper Priests.
Holy Warriors: Use Trench Cleric profile for Holy Warriors. 0-1 Trench Cleric and 0-2 Holy Warriors. Holy Warriors gain Blessed Psalm ACTION + Arise and be Healed! ACTION.
Short-Range Marksmanship: +1 DICE to Ranged Attacks at Short Range for Lieutenant and Yeomen (not Grenades, not HEAVY weapons).
Vanguard Forces: Cannot include Trench Moles. Up to 4 Yeomen can have Flanking ability for +5D each (deploy from any battlefield edge, 8" from enemies).
Warrior Nobles: Shock Troopers and ELITE models can have the Chewa ability for +5D each. Chewa: +1 DICE per friendly model within 1" of target (max +2 DICE).
Weapons of Mobile Warfare: Warband can have max 3 Ranged Weapons with HEAVY keyword (Satchel Charges don't count).

Yeoman: Up to 4 Yeomen. Deploy from any edge, 8" from enemies.
Shock Trooper: +1 DICE Melee per friendly adjacent target (max +2)
Lieutenant: +1 DICE Melee per friendly adjacent target (max +2)
Trench Cleric: +1 DICE Melee per friendly adjacent target (max +2)

abilities: Uses Trench Cleric Warband Entry. All Trench Cleric rules apply.
Blessed Psalm ACTION: Remove 1 BLESSED MARKER from this model and place it beside a friendly model. No Success Roll required.
Arise and be Healed! ACTION: Risky roll. On Success or Critical Success, pick this model or a friendly within 3" — it stands up for free and removes up to D3 BLOOD MARKERS and/or INFECTION MARKERS.
